We started Resend because we wanted a better email API for developers. A simple, fast, and elegant interface that just works. Here are 3 tips to get started. 1. Send your first email https://resend.= com/onboarding 2. Add your domain https://resend.com/domains 3. Check the docs https://resend.com/docs P.S.: Why did you sign up? What= brought you here? Hit "Reply" and let me know. I read and reply to every = email. Hit "Reply" and let me know. I read and reply to every = email.
